subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort in Rajasthan was built during the era of Raja Mansingh Tomar?
question_hi: राजस्थान में राजा मानसिंगस्टेंग तोमर के इरादेंमें कैसे बनी गयी?
explanation_en: Amber Fort, also known as Jaigarh Fort, was built during the era of Raja Mansingh Tomar. It was constructed by Maharaja Mansingh I in the 16th century.
explanation_hi: आंबे मंगल, यह राजा मानसिंग एस के समय में बना गया है। इसका निर्माणियों के संतुल महाराजा मानसिंग I ने 16वें सालों में बना गया है।
question_en: Which fort was built during the era of Raja Mansingh Tomar?
question_hi: क्या मंसांग एस के समय में बना गया हैंसांग एस के समय में बना गया है।

options.option_label_en_explanation: Amer Fort is a historic fort in Jaipur, Rajasthan built during the reign of King Jai Singh II.
options.option_label_hi_explanation: अमेर नगरी एक आधमांड है। इसका उद्रावाद (जापुर, राजस्थान में यहा अमेर नगरी के समय में बना गया है।

options.option_label_en_explanation: Ambernath is a town located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, not related to Rajasthan.
options.option_label_hi_explanation: अमेरनाथ एक माहर्षदगी है। यहा राजशान में नहींग है।

options.option_label_en_explanation: Amber Fort lies in Jaipur, Rajasthan, and was built during the reign of Raja Man Singh I.
options.option_label_hi_explanation: अमेर फोट जापुर, राजस्थान में बना गया है।

options.option_label_en_explanation: Chittorgarh Fort is famous for its historical significance and was built during the reign of Rana Kumbha of Mewar.
options.option_label_hi_explanation: चैटोरगैड्रा, ये इतिर्घार फोट को वास्त्रा मेवर इतिरगैड्रा, ये इतिर्घार फोट को वास्त्रा, जबास्तरा इतिरगैड्रा, ये इतिरैड्रा, ये इतिरगैड्रा को वास्तरा, ये इतिरैड्रा, ये इतिरैड्रा को वास्तरा, यंसिरा

options.explanation_en: Kumbhalgarh Fort, built during the reign of Kumbalgarh, is situated in Rajasthan.
Jaisam Fort is located in Bikanpur, Bikanpur, not in Rajasthan.
Ashapur Fort is located in Udaipur, Rajasthan.
